core_mechanism: exact linearization of a coupled nonlinear many-body dynamical system by a change of variables that maps the flow to free (linear) motion, via the correspondence between a polynomial's coefficients and its roots
brief_reason: The abstract states the N nonlinear ODEs are solved exactly by transforming them to free motion using the transition from the coefficients of a polynomial to its zeroes, which is a coordinate change that trivializes the nonlinear dynamics.
